title: Extracted Docs Management Service
summary: Moved shared Docs management behavior from the standalone HTTP server entrypoint into `scripts/docs/docs_management_service.py`, pointed the Local Studio Docs API adapter at that service module, and removed the old standalone HTTP server entrypoint.
effect: Local Studio no longer depends on `scripts/docs/docs_management_server.py` for reusable Docs management behavior, and there is no separate Docs Management server runtime or `127.0.0.1:8789` fallback. `/studio/api/docs/...` is the active Local Studio browser contract.
